auth.label: API Key
auth.description: VirusTotal API key sent as the x-apikey header. Find it in your account user menu or at https://www.virustotal.com/gui/my-apikey, as documented at https://docs.virustotal.com/reference/authentication.

actions.name: add_comment
actions.description: Add a community comment to a file, URL, domain, or IP address in VirusTotal.

fileId.description: File identifier such as a SHA-256 hash.

url.description: Raw URL string that will be converted into a VirusTotal URL identifier.

urlId.description: VirusTotal URL identifier encoded as unpadded base64url.

ipAddress.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to target.

text.description: Comment text to submit for the resource.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for adding a comment to a VirusTotal resource.

type.description: VirusTotal object type for the comment.

self.description: Canonical API URL for this resource or collection.

next.description: API URL for the next page of results.

prev.description: API URL for the previous page of results.

related.description: API URL for the related-resource view.

links.description: Links returned by the VirusTotal API.

attributes.description: The JSON object returned by VirusTotal.

meta.description: The JSON object returned by VirusTotal.

self.description: Canonical API URL for this resource or collection.

next.description: API URL for the next page of results.

prev.description: API URL for the previous page of results.

related.description: API URL for the related-resource view.

links.description: Links returned by the VirusTotal API.

outputSchema.description: Response returned after creating a VirusTotal comment.
